name: Lentil Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lentils and soak them for 30 minutes.
2. Heat half of the oil in a skillet.
3. Add the peppers and cook for 3 to 5 minutes until golden brown.
4. Drain and cool the peppers.
5. Add the remaining oil to the pan.
6. Cook the cumin seeds until they begin to pop.
7. Add onions and chilies, and cook for 8 minutes.
8. Stir in ginger and coriander.
9. Drain the lentils and add them to the pan with water.
10. Stir well and cover the pan.
11. Cook for 15 to 20 minutes until the liquid has evaporated.
12. Stir in salt and pepper to taste.
13. Add cilantro.
14. Cut off the tops of the peppers and remove the seeds.
15. Stuff the lentils into the peppers and replace the tops.
16. Place in a baking dish.
17. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
